function_v0.doc: Supply `amount` of `asset` to the Blend `pool`.\n\nThe vault pre-funds the strategy with the tokens before calling this.
function_v0.name: supply

function_v0.doc: Deposit `amount` of `asset` into Blend `pool` on behalf of `from` (vault).\n\nPulls tokens from `from` via transfer_from (requires pre-approval).
function_v0.name: deposit

function_v0.doc: Replace the contract WASM in-place. Only the vault manager may call this.
function_v0.name: upgrade

function_v0.doc: Withdraw `amount` of `asset` from Blend `pool`, sending tokens to `to`.
function_v0.name: withdraw

function_v0.doc: Return the value of all positions (alias \xe2\x80\x94 same as `get_total_value`).
function_v0.name: get_value

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the strategy for a vault.

No pool- or asset-specific arguments \xe2\x80\x94 positions are registered
dynamically on the first `supply` call for each pool.
function_v0.name: initialize

function_v0.doc: Return `true` if any active position involves `asset`.
function_v0.name: asset_in_use

function_v0.doc:
Return the total base-asset value of all positions for `vault`.

Budget profile:
* 1 `blend_get_supply` call per active pool (unavoidable \xe2\x80\x94 Blend tracks state)
* 1 `get_prices` batch call for all unique lending assets
function_v0.name: get_total_value

function_v0.doc: Return the number of active pools (> 0 means strategy holds positions).
function_v0.name: get_share_balance

function_v0.doc: Proportionally withdraw `numerator/denominator` of every active pool\nposition and send underlying tokens directly to `to`.
function_v0.name: withdraw_fraction

function_v0.doc: Return all pool addresses with a (potentially) non-zero supply balance.
function_v0.name: get_active_positions

function_v0.doc: Withdraw `amount` from Blend `pool` and return tokens to `vault`.
function_v0.name: withdraw_from_lending

function_v0.doc:
Return underlying token balances across all active Blend lending positions.

For each active pool: returns the lent token balance (queried from the
Blend pool). The vault uses this to batch-price all assets without
nesting factory + oracle calls inside the strategy.
function_v0.name: get_underlying_asset_balances

udt_error_enum_v0.doc:
All errors that the Blend strategy contract can raise.

Each variant maps to a unique `u32` discriminant so that the Soroban host
surfaces them as typed contract errors to external callers and to the vault.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: BlendStrategyError

cases.doc: `initialize` was already called on this contract instance.
cases.name: AlreadyInitialized

cases.doc: An entry-point that requires prior initialization was called before\n`initialize`.
cases.name: NotInitialized

cases.doc: The caller of `deposit` or `withdraw` is not the registered vault\naddress.
cases.name: NotVault

cases.doc: The caller of `pause` or `unpause` is not the registered manager\naddress.
cases.name: NotManager

cases.doc: The strategy is currently paused; no deposits or withdrawals are\naccepted.
cases.name: Paused

cases.doc: A zero or negative amount was supplied where a strictly-positive value\nis required.
cases.name: InvalidAmount

cases.doc: The requested withdrawal amount exceeds the strategy's current tracked\nposition.
cases.name: InsufficientPosition

void_v0.doc: Factory address (cached from vault at init).
void_v0.name: Factory

void_v0.doc: AssetHandler (lazy-cached from factory on first valuation).
void_v0.name: AssetHandler

void_v0.doc: Persistent init guard (survives instance TTL expiry).
void_v0.name: Initialized

tuple_v0.doc: Per-pool lending position, keyed by pool address.
tuple_v0.name: Position

void_v0.doc: Pool addresses where supply has been called (may have non-zero balance).
void_v0.name: ActivePositions

fields.doc: The token supplied to this Blend pool.
fields.name: asset
